scripts.test: npm run test -w packages/shared && npm run test -w apps/api && npm run test -w apps/frontend && npm run test -w templates/service-template
scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/shared && npm run build -w apps/api && npm run build -w apps/frontend && node scripts/sync-vercel-output.mjs
scripts.start: npm run build && npm run start:api
